_comment: Data sources catalog for mapx-style. Tracks all data feeding the MapLibre style. See MIGRATION.md §2 for field descriptions.

resources.name: Protomaps Basemap 2026-03-23
resources.description: OpenStreetMap-based vector basemap (roads, buildings, landuse, water, places). Updated daily builds available.
resources.notes: Dev: reference dev_url directly in the style (no upload needed). Prod: stream-upload from source_url to S3 without local storage using: uv run skills/s3/stream_upload.py <source_url> <s3_key> --type pmtiles --public. File is ~6-10 GB — do NOT download locally. Update source_url date for newer builds.

resources.name: UN Countries Polygons 2020
resources.description: UN 2020 country boundaries as filled polygons. Used for country mask layer (country-code).
resources.license: UN Geospatial — restricted redistribution, see data/un_countries/README.md
resources.notes: Source for mapx_borders.pmtiles generation via tippecanoe. Upload result to S3 as maps/borders.pmtiles.

resources.name: UN Countries Lines 2020
resources.description: UN 2020 country boundary lines at multiple admin levels (1–9).
resources.license: UN Geospatial — restricted redistribution, see data/un_countries/README.md
resources.notes: Combined with polygons and points into a single mapx_borders.pmtiles via tippecanoe.

resources.name: UN Countries Points 2020
resources.description: UN 2020 country centroids used for country name label layers.
resources.license: UN Geospatial — restricted redistribution, see data/un_countries/README.md
resources.notes: Combined with polygons and lines into mapx_borders.pmtiles.

resources.name: MapX Borders PMTiles (generated)
resources.description: Vector PMTiles generated from the three un_countries GeoJSON files. Uploaded to S3.
resources.notes: Generated from data/un_countries/ GeoJSONs via tippecanoe. Upload: uv run skills/s3/upload.py borders.pmtiles maps/borders.pmtiles --type pmtiles --public

resources.name: Terrain / Hillshade PMTiles
resources.description: Raster DEM used for hillshading and terrain visualization.
resources.notes: Placeholder. Candidate sources: Terrarium DEM (public domain), MapTiler Terrain. Update source_url when decided.

resources.name: Satellite Imagery COG
resources.description: Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF for satellite raster basemap layer.
resources.notes: Placeholder. Upload via: uv run skills/s3/upload.py satellite.tif cog/satellite.tif --type cog --public

resources.name: MapX Borders PMTiles v0
resources.description: UN 2020 country boundaries — polygons, lines, centroids

resources.name: MapX Borders PMTiles v1
resources.description: UN 2020 country boundaries — polygons, lines, centroids

resources.name: VersaTiles Bathymetry Vectors
resources.description: Global ocean depth zones from GEBCO, as vector tiles. Source-layer: bathymetry, property: mindepth (negative meters).
resources.notes: Build: uv run skills/build_bathymetry.py. Source: VersaTiles, zoom 0-10, 681 MB.

resources.name: VersaTiles Bathymetry v0
resources.description: Global ocean depth zones from GEBCO. Source-layer: bathymetry, property: mindepth (negative meters).

resources.name: UN Countries Mask GeoJSON v0
resources.description: UN 2020 country boundaries mask (MultiPolygon). Used with MapLibre within() expression to suppress OSM place labels over territories of UN member states that requested label suppression.
